scripts.lint: eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx --fix && echo "✅ Linting passed - all issues fixed!"
scripts.lint:check: eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx && echo "✅ Linting passed - no issues found!"
scripts.format: prettier --write "**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json,css,md,mdx}" && echo "✅ Formatting complete - all files formatted!"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json,css,md,mdx}" && echo "✅ Formatting passed - all files properly formatted!"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && echo "✅ TypeScript check passed - no type errors!"
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:check && npm run format:check && echo "🎉 All quality checks passed! Ready to commit."
